chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-612 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 19-12-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the case at some length does not press the petition and submits that he would file a suit for declaration seeking indulgence of the civil court to declare the petitioner as a legal heir of deceased Mst. Suriya. He has made this request in the context of objection raised by other side over the status of the petitioner to be legal heir of Mst. Suriya who was employed as Midwife in Municipal Corporation Sukkur. In view of above this petition is disposed of as not pressed in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
